name: Q359783
abstract: Frank Isola (February 20, 1925 – December 12, 2004 in Detroit, Michigan) was an American jazz drummer. Isola was born and raised in Detroit and was heavily influenced by Gene Krupa.

concerts.label: Jazz Concert featuring Duke Ellington, Billie Holiday, Charlie Parker and Others

works.t: Strike up the Band: Strike up the Band
There Will Never Be Another You

concerts.label: Midnight Performance: Jazz Concert featuring Duke Ellington, Billie Holiday, Charlie Parker and Others

about_quotes.speaker: Mose Allison
about_quotes.evidence: Well, Frank Isola and Taylor LaFarge had been playing with me at the 34th Street loft. We had gone over the Back Country Suite there. So I used them to make the record later.
about_quotes.doc_title: Mose Allison — Smithsonian Jazz Oral History
